_comment: Target companies pulled directly from their ATS so you catch postings before the community lists. ats = greenhouse | lever | ashby | calendar-only. token = the board slug for that ATS. calendar-only entries are Workday/custom portals we deliberately do NOT scrape; track them manually (see notes). To add a company: find its ATS slug and add a block. To stop tracking: delete the block or set ats to calendar-only.

companies.name: Jane Street
companies.note: Greenhouse events board only; primary trading/SWE internships live on the custom janestreet.com portal (calendar-only).

companies.name: Marshall Wace
companies.note: Internship Programmes board (London/NY/Singapore/HK interns). North-America-only board is 'mwnaintern'; firm-wide board is 'marshallwace'.

companies.name: PyTorch
companies.note: Open-source project (Meta/Linux Foundation); no dedicated corporate ATS.

companies.name: Bloomberg
companies.note: Custom bloomberg.com/company/careers portal (only Bloomberg Philanthropies is on Greenhouse).

companies.name: Rippling
companies.note: Runs its own ats.rippling.com (not Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby); still surfaces via the community repos.
